title: FAMILY SERVICES AND FOOD PANTRY - 211info
text: THE SALVATION ARMY THE DALLES CORPS FAMILY SERVICES AND FOOD PANTRY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a shopping style food pantry. Also provides emergency blankets, winter coats, personal grooming supplies and toiletries when available. Services are offered on a first-come, first-serve basis. 811 E 2nd Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 1pm-3pm Email (541) 296-6417 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-6417 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Gilliam, Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: Bedding/Linen Food Pantries Personal/Grooming Supplies Winter Clothing If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE SALVATION ARMY THE DALLES CORPS
